problem: Why is turbulent fluid flow mathematically unpredictable — Navier-Stokes unsolved
hypothesis: Bose-Einstein condensate at higher temperature may resolve Why is turbulent fluid flow mathematically unpredictable — Navier-Stokes unsolved by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
